CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt8);
SELECT id, NOT value AS negated_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE nested_query (id UInt32, active UInt8);
SELECT id FROM nested_query WHERE NOT active IN (SELECT active FROM nested_query WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE NOT (value = 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, is_active UInt8);
SELECT nt.id, nt.is_active, NOT (nt.is_active OR tt.value) AS negation FROM another_table nt JOIN test_table tt ON nt.id = tt.id;
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1);
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS total_count SELECT total_count, NOT (total_count > 2) AS is_less_than_two;
